title: TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 002 - Telnyx PyPI Compromise, Vect Ransomw

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 002 - Telnyx PyPI Comp
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/01
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*crates.io*'
            - '*isc.sans.edu*'
            - '*kubernetes.io*'
            - '*models.litellm.cloud*'
            - '*sans.org*'
            - '*scan.aquasecurtiy*'
            - '*tpcp.tar.gz*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
